post.summary:
Updates or creates company or provate person. 
If you will send request without ID parameter or OUTER ID parameter, service will create and return new company. 
 
If you will send request without ID and with OUTER ID, it will try to search company with defined outer_id. Create and return new if there is not such company.
 
If you did successful update service will return updated record.
 
 NOTICE! Better send company via urlencoded form to avoid data loss. 
 api/company HTTP/1.1
 Host: api.asminsolution.org
 Authorization: company:key
 Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded
 
 id=81890&name=sample name&desc=Description

parameters.name: filter.take
parameters.description: Sets the TAKE number records  returned

parameters.description: Filter by in arhive

parameters.name: filter.subject
parameters.description: Filter by mail subject

parameters.name: filter.name
parameters.description: Filter by mail name

parameters.name: filter.date_from
parameters.description: Filter by date to send from

parameters.name: filter.date_to
parameters.description: Filter by date to send to

parameters.name: filter.status
parameters.description:
Filter by mail status

all == -1,
pending = 0 when mm is prepared or been edited, not wants to be send yet,
scheduled = 1 when mm given to service and is been sheduled in service,
sending = 2 when mm given to service and is been sending in service,
paused = 3 when mm given to service and is been paused in service,
sent = 4 when mm recives response from service,
error = 5 when mm recives response from service

integer = 1,

bill = 9,

address = 13

error = 5 when mm recives response from service

operation_type.description: None = -1, Manual = 1, ExpensesToFund = 4, FundSetAside = 5, DokumentOperation = 20, Consolidation = 21, Debt = 22, DirectArrival = 23, DokumentOperation_MoveToFond = 24, DokumentOperation_MoveToBack = 25, CurrencySwich = 55, CurrencyChange = 60

ApiRoutingFormFilter.description: Routing Form filter applied to list;

basketType.description:
Basket = 0,
Taken = 1,
Overdue = 2,
Completed = 3,
Started = 4,
RequestReturn = 5,
All = 6 (default)

skip.description: Sets the SKIP number of records  returned

take.description: Sets the TAKE number records  returned

id_routing_form_template.description: Set filter by RF id template

sequence.description: List of tasks to be done in RF step

goToNext.description:
If value set 0 - creates RF and stay at current step.
If value set to x > 0 creates RF, step will complete and passed to x step.
Value must be ID from RF template_step according to current template

IdPresonStartFrom.description: ID person, responsible of statring RF

id_position.description: Position executing step of RF, ID position from Orgboard

dt_term.description: Term of RF step to be finished

_integer_data.description:
Numeric type user input.
Used as single numeric input or value of Lists - Company, Person, Bill, Invoice and user custom lists
(type: integer, personnel, list, company, bill, invoice )

_text_data.description:
Text type user input 
(type: text, textarea )

is_finished.description: Mark RF step sequence as done

dt_end.description: Marking RF step sequence as done 'is_finished', fill 'dt_end' with current time

type.description:
Custom field type  
integer = 1,
text = 2,
datetime = 3,
bit = 4,
floating = 5,
personnel = 6,
list = 7,
company = 8,
bill = 9,
invoice = 10,
attached = 11, (currently not supported in API)
textarea = 12

show.description: Is custom field shown on main list, also used in aditional filter

skip.description: Sets the SKIP number of records  returned

take.description: Sets the TAKE number records  returned

in_arhive.description: Checks archive stat. If NULL returns all (including archive). e.g. /api/stat?in_arhive (without any value)

skip.description: Sets the SKIP number of records  returned

take.description: Sets the TAKE number records  returned, default = 10

take.description: Sets the TAKE number records  returned

in_arhive.description: value = false: not arhive(defalult)/value = true: in arhive/value = null: all

status.description: Possible status - Expired = 1, Paid - 2, NotPaid = 3, PaidCurrentFp = 4

take.description: Sets the TAKE number records  returned

is_disabled.description: Checks archive people. If NULL returns all (including archive). e.g. /api/person?is_disabled (without any value)

skip.description: Sets the SKIP number of records  returned

take.description: Sets the TAKE number records  returned

period_begin.description: If specified, method takes active tasks from given date (format yyyy-MM-dd, time is not used). Filtering takes active tasks starting from begining of the day 00:00:00 (00:00:00AM).

period_end.description: If specified, method takes active tasks up to given date (format yyyy-MM-dd, time is not used). Filtering takes active tasks till the end of the day 23:59:59 (12:59:59PM).

id_person_creator.description: Person who created task (Default current api person if not specified)

is_with_no_date.description: Used when date is not specified, used in "To do list"

status.description: Possible status - None = 0, Expired = 1, Paid = 2, Not Paid = 3, Approved = 4, Not Approved = 6.
